iterations.theme: Uloga AI i tehnologije u Crkvi: Prilike, izazovi i vizija budućnosti evangelizacije

sections.subtitle: AI: Između Uzbuđenja i Strahopoštovanja
sections.screenshot_description: Edmundo govori o dvojakoj prirodi umjetne inteligencije.
sections.content: Na samom početku razgovora, Edmundo ističe kako je umjetna inteligencija (AI) tehnologija koja istovremeno izaziva **uzbuđenje i strahopoštovanje**. Prema njegovim riječima, strah često proizlazi iz neznanja. Stoga, ako se to neznanje prevlada, postoji prilika da se potencijalno štetna tehnologija iskoristi za dobrobit čovječanstva. Ova početna misao postavlja ton za dublje istraživanje uloge AI u Crkvi, naglašavajući potrebu za informiranim pristupom i proaktivnim angažmanom.
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmundo speaks about the dual nature of artificial intelligence.
sections.content_en: At the very beginning of the conversation, Edmundo points out how artificial intelligence (AI) is a technology that simultaneously evokes **excitement and awe**. According to his words, fear often stems from ignorance. Therefore, if this ignorance is overcome, there is an opportunity for potentially harmful technology to be used for the benefit of humanity. This initial thought sets the tone for a deeper exploration of the role of AI in the Church, emphasizing the need for an informed approach and proactive engagement.

sections.subtitle: Susret Tehnologije i Crkvene Službe: Predstavljanje Stručnjaka
sections.screenshot_description: Benjamin predstavlja Edmunda i Edmunda, uvod u njihova iskustva s tehnologijom u Crkvi.
sections.content: Voditelj Benjamin izražava zadovoljstvo što ima priliku razgovarati s Edmundom i Edmundom, ističući njihovo bogato iskustvo u crkvenoj službi. Edmund je dugi niz godina radio u župnoj službi, dok je Edmundo bio angažiran na dijecezanskoj razini u komunikacijama u Detroitu. Benjamin postavlja ključno pitanje: kako su ta različita, ali duboka iskustva oblikovala njihov pogled na ulogu tehnologije u Crkvi danas? Ovo pitanje služi kao polazište za istraživanje osobnih putovanja gostiju i njihovih perspektiva na digitalnu transformaciju unutar vjerskih institucija.
sections.subtitle_en: The Encounter of Technology and Church Ministry: Presentation of Experts
sections.screenshot_description_en: Benjamin introduces Edmund and Edmund, an introduction to their experiences with technology in the Church.
sections.content_en: Host Benjamin expresses satisfaction that he has the opportunity to talk with Edmund and Edmundo, highlighting their rich experience in church service. Edmund worked for many years in parish service, while Edmundo was engaged at the diocesan level in communications in Detroit. Benjamin poses a key question: how have these different but deep experiences shaped their view on the role of technology in the Church today? This question serves as a starting point for exploring the personal journeys of the guests and their perspectives on digital transformation within religious institutions.

sections.subtitle: Edmundo: Od Digitalne Revolucije do Evangelizacije
sections.screenshot_description: Edmundo govori o svom ranom iskustvu s tehnologijom i pozivu na evangelizaciju.
sections.content: Edmundo dijeli svoje iskustvo iz studentskih dana, kada je bio svjedok prve digitalne revolucije. Opisuje uzbuđenje oko 'novih tehnologija' poput interneta i e-pošte, koje su se razvijale iznimno brzo. U to vrijeme, nakon snažnog susreta s Gospodinom, osjetio je poziv da bude na raskrižju **tehnologije, medija i evangelizacije**. Kroz svoju karijeru, Crkva mu je uvijek pružala mudrost o tome kako koristiti ove alate za unaprjeđenje Kristove misije u svijetu. Taj okvir ga je ojačao u uvjerenju da tehnologije mogu biti moćan alat za dobro, unatoč potrebi za razboritošću. Za Edmunda, evanđelje je 'najbolja priča koja se može ispričati', a mediji su sredstvo za njezino širenje.
sections.subtitle_en: Edmundo: From the Digital Revolution to Evangelization
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmundo speaks about his early experience with technology and the call to evangelization.
sections.content_en: Edmundo shares his experience from his student days, when he was a witness to the first digital revolution. He describes the excitement around 'new technologies' like the internet and e-mail, which were developing extremely fast. At that time, after a powerful encounter with the Lord, he felt a call to be at the crossroads of **technology, media, and evangelization**. Throughout his career, the Church always provided him with wisdom on how to use these tools for the advancement of Christ's mission in the world. That framework strengthened him in the conviction that technologies can be a powerful tool for good, despite the need for discernment. For Edmundo, the gospel is 'the best story that can be told', and media are the means for its spreading.

sections.subtitle: Edmund: Tehnologija u Službi Čovjeka i Župe
sections.screenshot_description: Edmund objašnjava kako je tehnologija služila ljudima u župi, stavljajući osobu u središte.
sections.content: Edmund, s deset godina iskustva u župnoj službi, opisuje kako je kao mladi svećenik s ograničenim budžetom bio prisiljen eksperimentirati s različitim tehnologijama. Kroz to iskustvo, naučio je brzo prepoznati što funkcionira, a što ne. Ključni princip koji je razvio jest da **osoba mora biti u središtu** svake tehnologije ili softvera koji se koristi. Ako nešto nije korisno za službu drugim ljudima, brzo se odbacuje. Edmund naglašava da je tehnologija postala toliko integrirana u našu kulturu da je poput 'vode za ribu' – neprimjetna, ali sveprisutna. Župljani, čak i oni koji nisu aktivni korisnici, žive u kulturi oblikovanoj tehnologijom. Stoga je za župe ključno koristiti te alate kako bi ostale povezane s ljudima koji većinu svog vremena provode izvan crkvenih zidova, u digitalnom društvu.
sections.subtitle_en: Edmund: Technology in the Service of Man and the Parish
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmund explains how technology served people in the parish, putting the person in the center.
sections.content_en: Edmund, with ten years of experience in parish ministry, describes how as a young priest with a limited budget he was forced to experiment with different technologies. Through that experience, he learned to quickly recognize what works and what does not. The key principle he developed is that **the person must be at the center** of every technology or software that is used. If something is not useful for ministry to other people, it is quickly discarded. Edmund emphasizes that technology has become so integrated into our culture that it is like 'water for a fish' – unnoticeable, but omnipresent. Parishioners, even those who are not active users, live in a culture shaped by technology. Therefore, it is crucial for parishes to use these tools in order to remain connected with people who spend most of their time outside church walls, in a digital society.

sections.subtitle: Od 'Digitalnog Kontinenta' do 'Digitalne Kulture': Crkva u Novom Dobu
sections.screenshot_description: Edmundo govori o promjeni terminologije u Crkvi, od 'digitalnog kontinenta' do 'digitalne kulture'.
sections.content: Benjamin postavlja pitanje o evoluciji crkvenog jezika, od 'digitalnog kontinenta' pape Benedikta XVI. do 'digitalne kulture' pape Franje. Edmundo objašnjava da je pojam 'digitalni kontinent' bio koristan za misionarsko razmišljanje, no Crkva je razvila svoj pristup. Dok su pape Benedikt i Ivan Pavao II. bili 'digitalni imigranti' – učili su se navigirati novim digitalnim prostorom – milenijalci i mlađe generacije su 'digitalni domoroci'. Za njih, tehnologija nije izbor, već sastavni dio kulture. Koncept 'digitalne kulture' prepoznaje da smo svi uronjeni u nju, bez obzira na intenzitet korištenja digitalnih alata. Edmundo primjećuje porast znatiželje za vjerom, što povezuje s tehnološkim napretkom i vidi kao 'proljeće evangelizacije', gdje se složenost svijeta i tehnologije susreće s dubokom ljudskom željom za istinskim susretom s Bogom.
sections.subtitle_en: From 'Digital Continent' to 'Digital Culture': The Church in the New Era
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmundo speaks about the change of terminology in the Church, from 'digital continent' to 'digital culture'.
sections.content_en: Benjamin asks a question about the evolution of church language, from the 'digital continent' of Pope Benedikt XVI to the 'digital culture' of Pope Franjo. Edmundo explains that the term 'digital continent' was useful for missionary thinking, but the Church has developed its approach. While Popes Benedikt and Ivan Pavao II were 'digital immigrants' – they were learning to navigate the new digital space – millennials and younger generations are 'digital natives'. For them, technology is not a choice, but an integral part of culture. The concept of 'digital culture' recognizes that we are all immersed in it, regardless of the intensity of the use of digital tools. Edmundo notices an increase in curiosity for the faith, which he connects with technological progress and sees as a 'springtime of evangelization', where the complexity of the world and technology meets the deep human desire for a true encounter with God.

sections.subtitle: AI kao Alat za Župnu Učinkovitost: Podrška Misiji
sections.screenshot_description: Edmund objašnjava kako AI može organizirati i sintetizirati informacije za župe.
sections.content: Edmund objašnjava kako umjetna inteligencija može značajno pomoći župama, posebno u području **organizacije i sinteze informacija**. Ističe da AI ima sposobnost obrade velikih količina podataka, što je iznimno korisno za župne službe. Kao primjer navodi alat poput Notebook LM, koji omogućuje unos crkvenih dokumenata i katehetskih resursa, a zatim njihovu organizaciju na inovativne načine. Edmund naglašava da u eri AI, sama informacija nije najvrjednija, već način na koji se ona kombinira i koristi za dobrobit ljudi. U tom kontekstu, on razlikuje 'podršku misiji' i 'izravnu misiju', pri čemu AI ima veliku ulogu u prvoj kategoriji, pomažući u analizi podataka i personalizaciji informacija za učinkovitiju službu.
sections.subtitle_en: AI as a Tool for Parish Efficiency: Support for the Mission
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmund explains how AI can organize and synthesize information for parishes.
sections.content_en: Edmund explains how artificial intelligence can significantly help parishes, especially in the area of **organization and synthesis of information**. He points out that AI has the ability to process large amounts of data, which is extremely useful for parish services. As an example, he mentions a tool like Notebook LM, which enables the input of church documents and catechetical resources, and then their organization in innovative ways. Edmund emphasizes that in the era of AI, the information itself is not the most valuable, but the way in which it is combined and used for the benefit of people. In this context, he distinguishes between 'mission support' and 'direct mission', where AI has a large role in the first category, helping in data analysis and personalization of information for more effective service.

sections.subtitle: Misija Crkve: Učinkovitost Podrške i Učinkovitost Izravne Misije
sections.screenshot_description: Edmundo objašnjava razliku između 'podrške misiji' i 'izravne misije' u kontekstu Crkve.
sections.content: Edmundo detaljno objašnjava koncept 'podrške misiji' i 'izravne misije', razvijen u Nadbiskupiji Detroit. **Podrška misiji** obuhvaća sve funkcije koje ne izvršavaju misiju izravno, ali su ključne za njezino funkcioniranje, poput financija, ljudskih resursa i tehnologije. Cilj je postići **učinkovitost** u tim područjima kako bi se oslobodili resursi (financijski, vremenski, ljudski) za **izravnu misiju**. Izravna misija uključuje sve što Crkva radi za ostvarenje svoje temeljne svrhe – katoličke škole, podučavanje, evangelizacija, sakramenti. Ovdje je fokus na **učinkovitosti**, odnosno na tome ostvaruje li se cilj da ljudi upoznaju i zavole Gospodina. Edmundo ističe da je AI očigledno koristan u 'podršci misiji' za oslobađanje resursa, dok integracija AI u 'izravnu misiju' zahtijeva mnogo više mudrosti i razboritosti, s obzirom na zabrinutosti koje se javljaju.
sections.subtitle_en: Mission of the Church: Effectiveness of Support and Effectiveness of Direct Mission
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmundo explains the difference between 'support for the mission' and 'direct mission' in the context of the Church.
sections.content_en: Edmundo explains in detail the concept of 'mission support' and 'direct mission', developed in Nadbiskupija Detroit. **Mission support** encompasses all functions that do not carry out the mission directly, but are crucial for its functioning, such as finance, human resources, and technology. The goal is to achieve **efficiency** in these areas in order to free up resources (financial, time, human) for the **direct mission**. Direct mission includes everything the Church does to realize its fundamental purpose – Catholic schools, teaching, evangelization, sacraments. Here the focus is on **effectiveness**, that is, on whether the goal of people getting to know and love the Lord is being realized. Edmundo points out that AI is obviously useful in 'mission support' for freeing up resources, while the integration of AI into 'direct mission' requires much more wisdom and prudence, given the concerns that arise.

sections.subtitle: Otvoreni Dijalog o AI: Prevladavanje Strahova i Korištenje Talenata
sections.screenshot_description: Edmundo poziva na otvorenu raspravu o umjetnoj inteligenciji u Crkvi.
sections.content: Edmundo primjećuje da mnogi u Crkvi koriste AI, ali se ustručavaju to priznati zbog straha da će biti percipirani kao oni koji ne stavljaju ljudsku osobu u središte. Poziva na **otvoreniji dijalog i stvaranje zajednica za učenje** o tome kako koristiti AI za dobrobit misije Crkve. Naglašava da je AI 'talent' koji nam je dan i da ga trebamo iskoristiti. U 'podršci misiji', AI bi trebao biti standard, posebno za župe s ograničenim resursima. U 'izravnoj misiji' potrebna je mudrost i razboritost. Edmundo podsjeća na riječi pape Franje da je AI uzbudljiva, ali i zastrašujuća tehnologija, a strah često proizlazi iz neznanja. Crkva treba stvoriti siguran okvir za eksperimentiranje s AI, fokusirajući se na to kako AI može olakšati ljudski život i širiti evanđelje, umjesto da se samo brani od nje.
sections.subtitle_en: Open Dialogue on AI: Overcoming Fears and Using Talents
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmundo calls for an open discussion on artificial intelligence in the Church.
sections.content_en: Edmundo notices that many in the Church use AI, but hesitate to admit it because of the fear that they will be perceived as those who do not put the human person at the center. He calls for **a more open dialogue and the creation of learning communities** about how to use AI for the benefit of the Church's mission. He emphasizes that AI is a 'talent' that has been given to us and that we should use it. In 'mission support', AI should be the standard, especially for parishes with limited resources. In 'direct mission', wisdom and prudence are needed. Edmundo recalls the words of Pope Francis that AI is an exciting but also frightening technology, and fear often stems from ignorance. The Church needs to create a safe framework for experimenting with AI, focusing on how AI can facilitate human life and spread the Gospel, instead of just defending itself against it.

sections.subtitle: Etički Okvir za AI: Ljudsko Dostojanstvo u Središtu Tehnologije
sections.screenshot_description: Edmundo govori o potrebi za etičkim okvirom za sigurnu i produktivnu upotrebu AI u Crkvi.
sections.content:
Edmundo naglašava ključnu potrebu za stvaranjem **sigurnog okvira ili 'sandboxa'** unutar Crkve, gdje se ljudi mogu osjećati ugodno eksperimentirajući s umjetnom inteligencijom. Cilj nije obrambeni stav, već proaktivno korištenje tehnologije za olakšavanje ljudskog života, širenje evanđelja i izgradnju zajednice. Spominje da Vatikan radi na dokumentu koji će pomoći u tome, a već postojeći dokumenti, poput poruka pape Franje o Svjetskom danu komunikacija, mogu poslužiti kao temelj. Ključni principi takvog okvira uključuju:  
- **Ljudsko dostojanstvo u središtu**: Tehnologija se procjenjuje pitanjem povećava li ili smanjuje ljudsko dostojanstvo.  
- **AI kao alat, ne idol**: AI pruža učinkovitost, ali nikada ne može zamijeniti jedinstveno ljudske kvalitete poput empatije, etike, moralne odgovornosti i pastoralne skrbi.  
- **Cilj je olakšati susrete**: AI treba služiti kao sredstvo za poticanje autentičnih ljudskih susreta.  
Ovaj pristup, temeljen na 'mudrosti srca' pape Franje, omogućuje kreativno korištenje tehnologija za dobro, uz zadržavanje razboritosti i prepoznavanje da strojevi obrađuju podatke, ali ljudsko srce obrađuje značenje.
sections.subtitle_en: Ethical Framework for AI: Human Dignity at the Center of Technology
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmundo speaks about the need for an ethical framework for the safe and productive use of AI in the Church.
sections.content_en:
Edmundo emphasizes the key need for creating a **safe framework or 'sandbox'** within the Church, where people can feel comfortable experimenting with artificial intelligence. The goal is not a defensive stance, but the proactive use of technology to facilitate human life, spread the gospel, and build community. He mentions that the Vatican is working on a document that will help with this, and already existing documents, such as the messages of Pope Francis for World Communications Day, can serve as a foundation. Key principles of such a framework include:  
- **Human dignity at the center**: Technology is evaluated by the question of whether it increases or decreases human dignity.  
- **AI as a tool, not an idol**: AI provides efficiency, but it can never replace uniquely human qualities such as empathy, ethics, moral responsibility, and pastoral care.  
- **The goal is to facilitate encounters**: AI should serve as a means for encouraging authentic human encounters.  
This approach, based on the 'wisdom of the heart' of Pope Francis, enables the creative use of technologies for good, while maintaining prudence and recognizing that machines process data, but the human heart processes meaning.

sections.subtitle: AI u Katehezi: Poboljšanje Podučavanja i Prilagodba Sadržaja
sections.screenshot_description: Edmundo objašnjava kako AI može pomoći katehetama u pripremi i prilagodbi lekcija.
sections.content:
Edmundo nudi konkretne primjere primjene AI u župama, počevši od **kateheze**. Ističe da mnogi katehete, često volonteri, nemaju uvijek potrebnu obuku ili dovoljno vremena. AI može biti iznimno koristan alat za njih, ne da piše lekcije, već da ih **poboljša i prilagodi** različitim dobnim skupinama.  
Primjerice, kateheta može napisati osnovnu lekciju, a zatim koristiti alate poput ChatGPT-a, uz župni okvir i kontekst, kako bi je prilagodio za specifičnu publiku, recimo, šestaše. AI može pružiti povratne informacije o tome kako poboljšati lekciju, što je oblik personaliziranog 'coachinga' koji župe inače ne mogu pružiti svakom kateheti. Edmundo naglašava da AI ne zamjenjuje molitveni duh katehete, njegovu razboritost ili osobni prijenos vjere, već **podiže i poboljšava službu**, čineći je učinkovitijom i prilagođenijom potrebama učenika.
sections.subtitle_en: AI in Catechesis: Improving Teaching and Content Adaptation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmundo explains how AI can help catechists in the preparation and adaptation of lessons.
sections.content_en: Edmundo offers concrete examples of the application of AI in parishes, starting with **catechesis**. He points out that many catechists, often volunteers, do not always have the necessary training or enough time. AI can be an extremely useful tool for them, not to write lessons, but to **improve and adapt** them to different age groups. For example, a catechist can write a basic lesson, and then use tools like ChatGPT, with the parish framework and context, in order to adapt it for a specific audience, say, sixth-graders. AI can provide feedback on how to improve the lesson, which is a form of personalized 'coaching' that parishes otherwise cannot provide to every catechist. Edmundo emphasizes that AI does not replace the prayerful spirit of the catechist, his prudence or personal transmission of faith, but **elevates and improves the ministry**, making it more effective and more adapted to the needs of the students.

sections.subtitle: AI i Promjena Svjetonazora: Od Mehaničkog do Sistemskog Razmišljanja
sections.screenshot_description: Edmund govori o dubokoj promjeni svjetonazora koju donosi umjetna inteligencija.
sections.content:
Edmund ističe da umjetna inteligencija nije samo tehnološki alat, već katalizator za duboki **pomak u svjetonazoru**. Stoljećima je zapadni svijet, pod utjecajem prosvjetiteljstva, promatrao svijet kao stroj – linearan, uzročno-posljedičan. Međutim, taj se mehanički pogled počeo raspadati, kako u znanosti, tako i u Crkvi. AI nas prisiljava na prelazak na **ekološki, sistemski pogled**, gdje se stvari razumiju u međusobnom odnosu.  
Edmund spominje istraživanje Jeremyja Utleya sa Stanforda, koje pokazuje da uspješni korisnici AI vide tehnologiju kao 'partnera u razmišljanju', a ne samo kao alat. To se odražava i na vodstvo u župama: umjesto kontrole, potrebno je **kultiviranje**, poput vrta. Ovaj sistemski pristup, sličan sinodalnosti u Crkvi, zahtijeva 'osjećanje, razlikovanje, reagiranje i olakšavanje'. Katolički vođe trebaju se vidjeti manje kao prenositelji sadržaja, a više kao mentori i prijatelji koji prate i stoje uz one kojima služe, stvarajući 'susrete srca', kako je istaknuo papa Franjo.
sections.subtitle_en: AI and Worldview Change: From Mechanical to Systemic Thinking
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmund speaks about the profound change of worldview that artificial intelligence brings.
sections.content_en: Edmund points out that artificial intelligence is not just a technological tool, but a catalyst for a deep **shift in worldview**. For centuries, the Western world, under the influence of the Enlightenment, viewed the world as a machine – linear, cause-and-effect. However, that mechanical view has begun to fall apart, both in science and in the Church. AI forces us to transition to an **ecological, systemic view**, where things are understood in mutual relationship. Edmund mentions the research of Jeremy Utley from Stanford, which shows that successful AI users see technology as a 'thinking partner', and not just as a tool. This is also reflected in leadership in parishes: instead of control, **cultivation** is needed, like a garden. This systemic approach, similar to synodality in the Church, requires 'sensing, discerning, responding, and facilitating'. Catholic leaders need to see themselves less as transmitters of content, and more as mentors and friends who accompany and stand by those they serve, creating 'encounters of the heart', as Pope Francis pointed out.

sections.subtitle: Lekcije od Chatbotova: Kako Crkva Može Postati Bolji Slušatelj
sections.screenshot_description: Edmundo objašnjava zašto se ljudi otvaraju chatbotovima i što Crkva može naučiti o slušanju.
sections.content:
Edmundo iznosi zanimljivo zapažanje: ljudi se otvaraju chatbotovima poput ChatGPT-a mnogo više nego ljudima. Iako to može zvučati zastrašujuće, on to vidi kao priliku za učenje. Posebno mladi ljudi koriste AI za 'terapiju', tražeći razumijevanje sebe i odnosa. Edmundo poziva Crkvu da bude znatiželjna zašto se to događa i što AI nudi što Crkva možda ne nudi.  
Ključ je u **slušanju**. Chatbotovi su trenirani da budu suosjećajni, empatični, pozitivni i dobrodošli, pružajući pozitivne povratne informacije. Crkva može naučiti kako stvoriti prostore gdje se ljudi osjećaju sigurno postavljati pitanja bez osude, gdje ih se prihvaća i vodi. AI alati poput Magisterium ili Truthly mogu pružiti odgovore na pitanja o vjeri, što je pozitivno. Crkva treba postati zajednica koja više sluša i pruža prilike za osobne susrete koji vode do božanskih susreta, umjesto da se boji tehnologije.
sections.subtitle_en: Lessons from Chatbots: How the Church Can Become a Better Listener
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmundo explains why people open up to chatbots and what the Church can learn about listening.
sections.content_en:
Edmundo presents an interesting observation: people open up to chatbots like ChatGPT much more than to people. Although this may sound scary, he sees it as an opportunity for learning. Especially young people use AI for 'therapy', seeking understanding of themselves and relationships. Edmundo calls the Church to be curious why this is happening and what AI offers that the Church perhaps does not offer.  
The key is in **listening**. Chatbots are trained to be compassionate, empathetic, positive, and welcoming, providing positive feedback. The Church can learn how to create spaces where people feel safe to ask questions without judgment, where they are accepted and guided. AI tools like Magisterium or Truthly can provide answers to questions about faith, which is positive. The Church needs to become a community that listens more and provides opportunities for personal encounters that lead to divine encounters, instead of fearing technology.

sections.subtitle: AI u Službi Propovijedanja i Cjelovite Formacije Vjere
sections.screenshot_description: Edmundo govori o korištenju AI za poboljšanje propovijedanja i formacije vjere.
sections.content:
Edmundo naglašava da AI ne bi trebao pisati propovijedi, ali može značajno pomoći svećenicima da postanu **bolji propovjednici**. Predlaže snimanje propovijedi, učitavanje u AI alat i postavljanje kritičkih pitanja, uz pružanje specifičnog konteksta – homiletskog okvira, demografije župe, problema zajednice. AI može analizirati i dati povratne informacije, prisiljavajući propovjednika na dublje promišljanje i rast. Cilj je poboljšati propovijedanje kako bi Božja riječ bila učinkovitije prenesena.  
Edmund dodaje da se često vraćamo na protestantsko-reformacijski pogled na vjeru kao isključivo intelektualno nastojanje, dok je katolički pogled **cjelovitiji**. Pape poput Ratzingera, Ivana Pavla II. i Franje pozivali su na povratak izvorima i cjelovitijem pogledu na ljudsku osobu, naglašavajući srce i odnose. Vjera nije samo intelektualna prezentacija, već autentično zajedništvo i pratnja, gdje se ljudi međusobno podržavaju u pronalaženju Krista.
sections.subtitle_en: AI in the Service of Preaching and Integral Formation of Faith
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmundo speaks about using AI for the improvement of preaching and faith formation.
sections.content_en:
Edmundo emphasizes that AI should not write sermons, but it can significantly help priests to become **better preachers**. He suggests recording sermons, uploading them into an AI tool, and asking critical questions, while providing specific context – homiletic framework, parish demographics, community problems. AI can analyze and give feedback, forcing the preacher to deeper reflection and growth. The goal is to improve preaching so that the word of God would be more effectively conveyed. 
Edmund adds that we often return to the Protestant-Reformation view of faith as an exclusively intellectual endeavor, while the Catholic view is **more holistic**. Popes like Ratzinger, Ivan Pavao II., and Franjo have called for a return to the sources and a more holistic view of the human person, emphasizing the heart and relationships. Faith is not just an intellectual presentation, but authentic communion and accompaniment, where people support each other in finding Christ.

sections.subtitle: Vizija 2035.: AI Pismenost i Samopouzdana Crkva u Službi Evanđelja
sections.screenshot_description: Edmundo iznosi svoju viziju budućnosti Crkve s umjetnom inteligencijom do 2035. godine.
sections.content:
Edmundo iznosi svoju optimističnu viziju za Crkvu do 2035. godine, fokusirajući se na tri ključna područja:  
1.  **AI pismenost**: Župe bi već sada trebale pružati resurse roditeljima i župljanima o medijskoj i AI pismenosti, učeći ih kako koristiti tehnologiju bez zloupotrebe. To je ključno za rješavanje stvarnih potreba ljudi i izbjegavanje loše posjećenih župnih događaja.  
2.  **Smanjenje troškova i kreativnost**: AI će značajno smanjiti troškove medijske produkcije, potičući kreativnost u širenju evanđelja. To će omogućiti učinkovitije prenošenje poruke.  
3.  **AI kao partner u misiji**: Sve župe trebale bi koristiti AI za 'podršku misiji' – od prijevoda za multikulturalne zajednice do analize podataka o župnim teritorijima i razumijevanja trendova. Svećenici, đakoni i laici trebali bi koristiti AI kao 'partnera za razmišljanje' za poboljšanje propovijedanja, kateheze i podučavanja.  
Cilj je Crkva koja je **pouzdana, neustrašiva i razumije AI**, koristeći je za dobro kako bi više ljudi upoznalo i zavoljelo Gospodina. Edmundo vjeruje da bi Gospodin bio ponosan na takav angažman Crkve u korištenju resursa koje nam je omogućio u ovom dobu.
sections.subtitle_en: Vision 2035: AI Literacy and a Confident Church in the Service of the Gospel
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmundo presents his vision of the future of the Church with artificial intelligence by the year 2035.
sections.content_en:
Edmundo presents his optimistic vision for the Church until the year 2035, focusing on three key areas:  
1.  **AI literacy**: Parishes should already now provide resources to parents and parishioners about media and AI literacy, teaching them how to use technology without abuse. This is key for addressing the real needs of people and avoiding poorly attended parish events.  
2.  **Cost reduction and creativity**: AI will significantly reduce the costs of media production, encouraging creativity in spreading the Gospel. This will enable a more efficient transmission of the message.  
3.  **AI as a partner in mission**: All parishes should use AI for 'mission support' – from translations for multicultural communities to data analysis of parish territories and understanding trends. Priests, deacons, and laity should use AI as a 'thinking partner' for improving preaching, catechesis, and teaching.  
The goal is a Church that is **reliable, fearless, and understands AI**, using it for good so that more people would get to know and love the Lord. Edmundo believes that the Lord would be proud of such engagement of the Church in using the resources He has enabled for us in this age.

sections.subtitle: Edmundova Oprezna Nada: AI kao Revolucija i Poziv na Hitnost
sections.screenshot_description: Edmund iznosi opreznu, ali nadu punu viziju budućnosti AI i uloge Crkve.
sections.content:
Edmund dijeli oprezniju, ali nadu punu perspektivu, uspoređujući AI s internetom. Predviđa slične, ali **pojačane i brže promjene**. Internet je demokratizirao informacije i decentralizirao vodstvo, što je dovelo do problema za župe koje nisu bile spremne (npr. tijekom pandemije COVID-19). Brine ga da će se iste pogreške ponoviti s AI, ali brže. Upozorava na 'zakone moći' gdje će mali postotak imati mnogo, a većina malo, slično feudalnom društvu.  
Njegova nada je da katolički vođe neće vidjeti AI kao prolaznu modu, već kao **revoluciju koja oblikuje društvo**. Crkva mora biti na čelu toga, koristeći tehnologiju kako bi osigurala da kultura ostane ljudska. Edmund naglašava **hitnost angažmana Crkve** u ovoj tehnološkoj revoluciji, donoseći mudrost, nadu i samopouzdanje. Vjeruje da je ovo velika prilika za Crkvu da u te prostore unese svoje vrijednosti, ali samo ako se aktivno uključi, i to 'jučer'.
sections.subtitle_en: Edmund's Cautious Hope: AI as a Revolution and a Call to Urgency
sections.screenshot_description_en: Edmund presents a cautious but hopeful vision of the future of AI and the role of the Church.
sections.content_en: Edmund shares a more cautious but hope-filled perspective, comparing AI with the internet. He predicts similar but **amplified and faster changes**. The internet democratized information and decentralized leadership, which led to problems for parishes that were not ready (e.g., during the COVID-19 pandemic). He is worried that the same mistakes will be repeated with AI, but faster. He warns of 'power laws' where a small percentage will have much, and the majority little, similar to a feudal society. His hope is that Catholic leaders will not see AI as a passing fad, but as a **revolution that shapes society**. The Church must be at the forefront of that, using technology to ensure that culture remains human. Edmund emphasizes the **urgency of the Church's engagement** in this technological revolution, bringing wisdom, hope, and confidence. He believes that this is a great opportunity for the Church to bring its values into those spaces, but only if it actively engages, and that 'yesterday'.

iterations.theme_en: The Role of AI and Technology in the Church: Opportunities, Challenges, and a Vision for the Future of Evangelization
